creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text: Kurt, if it only breaks on 8.4 i386, then I suggest putting a check for OPSYS==FreeBSD and OSREL==8.4 and just setting IGNORE if those are true.   If that's the only thing holding these up, that seems prudent to me.  Somebody can submit a fix for 8.4 i386 later if it's really desired.
